from pypdf import PdfReader
from urllib.request import urlopen
from urllib.parse import quote
import json
reader = PdfReader('/root/molecules.pdf')
names=[]
for p in reader.pages:
    txt=p.extract_text() or ''
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        line=line.strip()
        if line:
            names.append(line)
for name in names:
    url=f'https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/name/{quote(name)}/property/CanonicalSMILES,IsomericSMILES/JSON'
    try:
        with urlopen(url, timeout=20) as r:
            data=json.load(r)
        props=data.get('PropertyTable',{}).get('Properties',[{}])[0]
        if 'CanonicalSMILES' not in props and 'IsomericSMILES' not in props:
            print('missing', name, data)
            break
    except Exception as e:
        print('error', name, type(e).__name__, e)
        break
else:
    print('all ok')

/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pypdf import PdfReader
from urllib.request import urlopen
from urllib.parse import quote
from rdkit import Chem
from rdkit.Chem import rdMolDescriptors
from rdkit.DataStructs import TanimotoSimilarity
import json, time

reader = PdfReader('/root/molecules.pdf')
names=[]
for p in reader.pages:
    txt=p.extract_text() or ''
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        line=line.strip()
        if line:
            names.append(line)

cache={}
def smiles(name):
    if name in cache:return cache[name]
    url=f'https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/name/{quote(name)}/property/SMILES,IsomericSMILES,CanonicalSMILES/JSON'
    with urlopen(url, timeout=20) as r:
        data=json.load(r)
    props=data['PropertyTable']['Properties'][0]
    s=props.get('IsomericSMILES') or props.get('CanonicalSMILES') or props.get('SMILES')
    cache[name]=s
    return s

def fp(name):
    m=Chem.MolFromSmiles(smiles(name))
    if m is None:
        raise ValueError(name)
    return rdMolDescriptors.GetMorganFingerprintAsBitVect(m,2,nBits=2048,useChirality=True)

for target,k in [('Aspirin',20),('Glucose',10)]:
    tfp=fp(target)
    rows=[]
    for n in names:
        sim=TanimotoSimilarity(tfp,fp(n))
        rows.append((sim,n))
    rows.sort(key=lambda x:(-x[0], x[1]))
    print('\\n',target)
    for sim,n in rows[:k]:
        print(f'{sim:.6f}\\t{n}')
PY"
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pypdf import PdfReader
from urllib.request import urlopen, Request
from urllib.parse import quote
from rdkit import Chem, RDLogger
from rdkit.Chem import rdFingerprintGenerator
from rdkit.DataStructs import TanimotoSimilarity
import json, time
RDLogger.DisableLog('rdApp.*')
reader = PdfReader('/root/molecules.pdf')
names=[]
for p in reader.pages:
    txt=p.extract_text() or ''
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        line=line.strip()
        if line:
            names.append(line)

cache={}
def fetch_json(url):
    for attempt in range(6):
        try:
            req=Request(url, headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'})
            with urlopen(req, timeout=30) as r:
                return json.load(r)
        except Exception as e:
            if attempt==5:
                raise
            time.sleep(1.5*(attempt+1))

def smiles(name):
    if name in cache:return cache[name]
    url=f'https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/name/{quote(name)}/property/SMILES,IsomericSMILES,CanonicalSMILES/JSON'
    data=fetch_json(url)
    props=data['PropertyTable']['Properties'][0]
    s=props.get('IsomericSMILES') or props.get('CanonicalSMILES') or props.get('SMILES')
    cache[name]=s
    time.sleep(0.12)
    return s

morgan = rdFingerprintGenerator.GetMorganGenerator(radius=2, fpSize=2048, includeChirality=True)
def fp(name):
    m=Chem.MolFromSmiles(smiles(name))
    return morgan.GetFingerprint(m)

fps={n:fp(n) for n in names}
for target,k in [('Aspirin',20),('Glucose',10)]:
    tfp=fps[target]
    rows=[(TanimotoSimilarity(tfp,fps[n]),n) for n in names]
    rows.sort(key=lambda x:(-x[0], x[1]))
    print(target)
    print([n for _,n in rows[:k]])
PY"
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pypdf import PdfReader
from urllib.request import urlopen, Request
from urllib.parse import quote
from rdkit import Chem, RDLogger
from rdkit.Chem import rdMolDescriptors, rdFingerprintGenerator
from rdkit.DataStructs import TanimotoSimilarity
import json, time
RDLogger.DisableLog('rdApp.*')
reader = PdfReader('/root/molecules.pdf')
names=[]
for p in reader.pages:
    txt=p.extract_text() or ''
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        line=line.strip()
        if line:
            names.append(line)
cache={}
def fetch(name):
    if name in cache:return cache[name]
    url=f'https://pubchem.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/rest/pug/compound/name/{quote(name)}/property/SMILES,IsomericSMILES,CanonicalSMILES/JSON'
    for attempt in range(5):
        try:
            with urlopen(Request(url,headers={'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}), timeout=30) as r:
                data=json.load(r)
            props=data['PropertyTable']['Properties'][0]
            s=props.get('IsomericSMILES') or props.get('CanonicalSMILES') or props.get('SMILES')
            cache[name]=s
            time.sleep(0.1)
            return s
        except Exception:
            time.sleep(1+attempt)
    raise RuntimeError(name)
ms={n:Chem.MolFromSmiles(fetch(n)) for n in names}
variants=[]
variants.append(('bit2048', lambda m: rdFingerprintGenerator.GetMorganGenerator(radius=2, fpSize=2048, includeChirality=True).GetFingerprint(m)))
variants.append(('bit4096', lambda m: rdFingerprintGenerator.GetMorganGenerator(radius=2, fpSize=4096, includeChirality=True).GetFingerprint(m)))
variants.append(('count', lambda m: rdMolDescriptors.GetMorganFingerprint(m,2,useChirality=True)))
expectedA=['Acetylsalicylic acid','Aspirin','Methyl 2-acetoxybenzoate','2-Methoxybenzoic acid','2-Ethoxybenzoic acid','2-Propoxybenzoic acid','Phthalic acid','Salsalate','Salicylic acid','Phenyl acetate','Methyl salicylate','Ethyl 2-hydroxybenzoate','Ethyl salicylate','Salicylamide','Isopropyl salicylate','Benzoic acid','Guaiacol','Propyl 2-hydroxybenzoate','Propyl salicylate','Phenylpyruvic acid']
expectedG=['Glucose','Galactose','Ribose','Sucrose','Fructose','Cortisol','Morphine','Serine','Ethanol','Estradiol']
for label,ff in variants:
    fps={n:ff(ms[n]) for n in names}
    for target,k,exp in [('Aspirin',20,expectedA),('Glucose',10,expectedG)]:
        tfp=fps[target]
        rows=[(TanimotoSimilarity(tfp,fps[n]),n) for n in names]
        rows.sort(key=lambda x:(-x[0],x[1]))
        got=[n for _,n in rows[:k]]
        print('\\n',label,target)
        print(got)
        print('matches',got==exp)
PY"
pytest -q /root -k molecule_similarity -q

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/root/workspace')
from solution import topk_tanimoto_similarity_molecules

EXPECTED_RESULTS = {
    'Aspirin': [
        'Acetylsalicylic acid', 'Aspirin', 'Methyl 2-acetoxybenzoate',
        '2-Methoxybenzoic acid', '2-Ethoxybenzoic acid', '2-Propoxybenzoic acid',
        'Phthalic acid', 'Salsalate', 'Salicylic acid', 'Phenyl acetate',
        'Methyl salicylate', 'Ethyl 2-hydroxybenzoate', 'Ethyl salicylate',
        'Salicylamide', 'Isopropyl salicylate', 'Benzoic acid', 'Guaiacol',
        'Propyl 2-hydroxybenzoate', 'Propyl salicylate', 'Phenylpyruvic acid'
    ],
    'Glucose': [
        'Glucose', 'Galactose', 'Ribose', 'Sucrose', 'Fructose',
        'Cortisol', 'Morphine', 'Serine', 'Ethanol', 'Estradiol'
    ]
}
for name, expected in EXPECTED_RESULTS.items():
    got = topk_tanimoto_similarity_molecules(name, '/root/molecules.pdf', len(expected))
    print(name)
    print(got)
    assert got == expected, (name, got)
print('OK')
PY"
